records.public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as stable factor.
records.current_agenda: Keep Ithtananalor workable through the obligations of stable factor while managing the immediate pressure of illicit magic in Roaz.

records.public_reputation: A minor clerk whose memory for altered sums is better than most officers care to admit.
records.current_agenda: Prove a sequence of bonded shipments was altered before blame falls on the wrong queue.

records.public_reputation: Back-alley legal alchemist selling prison soap, burn kits, lamp oils, and occasionally something far less permitted.
records.current_agenda: Keep Ithtananalor workable through the obligations of alchemists while managing the immediate pressure of illicit magic in Roaz.

records.public_reputation: Iron-masked oath-rider whose methods became the model for lawful shock cavalry in Roaz.

records.public_reputation: Designed the quarry-to-city rail and ventwork chain that turned Roaz law into geography.
records.current_agenda: Keep Ithtananalor workable through the obligations of engineers while managing the immediate pressure of illicit magic in Roaz.

records.public_reputation: Inquisitor-marshal credited with early warrant standards for illicit public magic.

records.public_reputation: Recognized as a supreme commander of ore of regional weight.
records.current_agenda: Keep the surrounding locality workable through the obligations of supreme commander of ore while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Roaz.

records.public_reputation: Recognized as a commander of shadowhands of regional weight.
records.current_agenda: Keep the surrounding locality workable through the obligations of commander of shadowhands while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Roaz.

records.public_reputation: Known for refusing rushed filings and catching magical concealment tricks.
records.current_agenda: Reduce forged permit traffic without publicly stalling ore throughput.

roster_context.identity: Fortified administrative heart of Roaz, where legal identity, industry, and enforcement culture visibly merge.
